fields.name: source_ref
fields.description: Canonical source anchor for the memory or evidence record.

fields.name: writing_agent
fields.description: Named actor or agent that initiated the write.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: 0-1 confidence score for governed retrieval and approval workflows.

fields.name: validation_metadata
fields.description: Evidence of validation, review, or fail-closed rules applied before persistence.

fields.name: approval_reference
fields.description: Approval or review reference required before a skill is publishable.

fields.name: review_state
fields.description: quarantine, approved, or rejected lifecycle state.
